mysite
Table of Contents

Class UsuarioService

Namespace
Service.Logic
Assembly
Service.dll

Manages user authentication, registration, profile updates, and password management.

public class UsuarioService
Inheritance
object
UsuarioService
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Passwords are stored as SHA-256 hashes via HashPassword(string). Every write operation recomputes DigitoVerificador (a SHA-256 hash of all scalar fields) to enable tamper-detection on the user record.

Permission assignments are delegated to UpdateAccesos(Guid, List<Acceso>), which performs a delete-and-reinsert of the user's access tree.

Constructors

UsuarioService()

Initializes the service with the IUsuarioRepository singleton from FactoryDao.

public UsuarioService()

Methods

Delete(Guid)

Permanently deletes the user with the given identifier.

public void Delete(Guid id)

Parameters

id Guid

Primary key of the user to delete.

GetUsuarios()

Returns all users as DTOs via GetUsuariosDTO().

public List<UsuarioDTO> GetUsuarios()

Returns

List<UsuarioDTO>

Login(string, string)

Authenticates a user by username and plaintext password.

public UsuarioDTO Login(string username, string password)

Parameters

username string

Username to look up.

password string

Plaintext password; hashed internally before comparison.

Returns

UsuarioDTO

A UsuarioDTO with the authenticated user's identity, permissions, and resolved RolNegocio ("Administrador", "Operador", or a comma-separated list of permission names).

Exceptions

Exception

Thrown with localized messages when the user is not found, the password is incorrect, or the account is blocked.

Register(UsuarioDTO, string)

Creates a new user account with the given permissions.

public void Register(UsuarioDTO dto, string password)

Parameters

dto UsuarioDTO

User data including optional initial permission set.

password string

Plaintext password; stored as a SHA-256 hash.

Exceptions

Exception

Thrown when a user with the same username already exists.

ResetPassword(Guid, string)

Replaces a user's password with a new hashed value and updates the integrity check digit.

public void ResetPassword(Guid id, string newPassword)

Parameters

id Guid

Primary key of the user whose password to reset.

newPassword string

New plaintext password; stored as a SHA-256 hash.

Exceptions

Exception

Thrown when the user does not exist.

Update(UsuarioDTO)

Updates a user's username, status, and permission set.

public void Update(UsuarioDTO dto)

Parameters

dto UsuarioDTO

Updated user data. Id must identify an existing user.

Exceptions

Exception

Thrown when the user does not exist.
